message:
Consolidate PhaseTracker usage in e2e_large_dataset and e2e_pages tests

Remove duplicated PhaseTracker implementations and use the shared
util::e2e_log::PhaseTracker:

e2e_large_dataset.rs:
- Add tracker_for() helper for consistent test naming
- Update all 5 tests to use PhaseTracker::new("e2e_large_dataset", "test_name")
- Import E2ePerformanceMetrics for metrics() calls

e2e_pages.rs:
- Add tracker_for() helper
- Remove 60+ lines of duplicated PhaseTracker code
- Use shared implementation with Drop-based auto-completion

This completes the consolidation of PhaseTracker across all E2E test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
